title: Home Page Builder

sections.content: Use this section manager to add operational messaging without changing code. Edits appear after publish and cache refresh.

title: Dashboard Builder
summary: Manage top sections for the user command dashboard.

sections.title: Operator Note
sections.content: Use this area for announcements, policy notes, and workflow reminders for signed-in users.

title: National Cases Builder
summary: Manage hero and instruction sections for the national case index.

sections.title: National Intake Policy
sections.content: All case entries should include source attribution and update timestamps before being promoted to operational status.
